name: SETayGB•1 review
comment: Nightmare returns I recently placed an order for multiple items from this retailer, as they appeared to offer exactly what I needed for the theme of my hen do. This was my first time ordering from them, and unfortunately, it will also be my last.I have given a rating of two stars, as I did receive a few items that were suitable for my needs. However, the returns process for the remaining items has been extremely frustrating. As a UK-based customer, I was dismayed to discover that returning items would cost at least £30, as the retailer requires customers to arrange and pay for their own return shipping.Additionally, it is stated albeit in very fine and indirect print that refunds are not issued; instead, only store credit is offered. As a result, I will not be receiving any of my £156 back. This policy is particularly disappointing given the quality and sizing issues I encountered.One dress labeled as a medium would only fit a UK size 6, and another item arrived faulty, with a broken zip that made it impossible to even try on.I would strongly advise UK customers to avoid this retailer unless you are absolutely certain of what you want, are confident in the sizing, and have no intention of returning anything.Date of experience: July 27, 2025

name: Heidi PontonsUS•1 review
comment: I ordered an item from Fashion Nova for…I ordered an item from Fashion Nova for a specific event, and it arrived late — past the date I needed it. They would not issue a refund, would not cover return shipping, and refused to even offer a gift card to cover the return label.Their customer service has been incredibly frustrating — robotic responses, no accountability, and no real effort to help. I went back and forth several times, only to be told the same thing over and over again. It was clear they could have easily resolved this by issuing a return label or credit, but chose not to. name: AbyGB•4 reviews
comment: The Worst shopping experience, never again omg I ordered several items from Fashion Nova and received a pile of cheap, faulty clothing that looked nothing like the photos. The quality was appalling — stitching loose, fabrics see-through, items clearly not checked.When I tried to return them, I was told to send them back at my own cost — £88 from the UK. That’s nearly as much as I spent on the order! I explained the cost was unreasonable and that the items were defective, but Fashion Nova didn’t care.I raised a PayPal dispute and explained everything, but because I couldn’t afford the insane shipping fee, the case was automatically closed. No refund. No accountability. No response from Fashion Nova.Their customer service is non-existent. Everything is automated, there’s no real support, and they make it impossible to speak to a human being.Fashion Nova is happy to take your money and send you trash, but when there’s a problem, they do nothing to fix it. I’ve never felt so scammed by a “mainstream” fashion brand.Absolutely disgraceful company. I would never shop here again and urge everyone to avoid them.Date of experience: July 18, 2025
